TYPES.FPCLINE: tt_item TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_item.
tt_Final1 TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF TY_FINAL1.
tt_marc TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_marc.
tt_mat_desc TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_mat_desc.
tt_mat_doc TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_mat_doc.
tt_purchasing TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_purchasing.
tt_j_1ig_subcon TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_j_1ig_subcon.
tt_konp TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_konp.
tt_conditions TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_conditions.
fkdat TYPE vbrk-fkdat,"ADDED BY PRIMUS JYOTI
ttt_vbrk type STANDARD TABLE OF ty_vbrk.
tt_konv TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_konv.
tt_konp1 TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_konp1.
ttt_A005 TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_A005.
tt_final TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_final.
tt_mseg TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_mseg.

INITIALIZATION.FPCLINE: KWERT FROM PRCD_ELEMENTS INTO TABLE IT_KONV
READ TABLE IT_VBRK INTO WA_VBRK WITH KEY VBELN = WA_FINAL-VBELN.
READ TABLE IT_MSEG INTO WA_MSEG WITH KEY MBLNR = GS_ITEM-VGBEL.
READ TABLE IT_ZEWAY_BILL INTO WA_ZEWAY_BILL WITH KEY VBELN = GS_ITEM-VBELN.
READ TABLE IT_ZEWAY INTO WA_ZEWAY WITH KEY VBELN = WA_ZEWAY_BILL-VBELN.
LOOP AT IT_KONV INTO WA_KONV WHERE KNUMV = WA_VBRK-KNUMV AND KPOSN = WA_FINAL-POSNR.
READ TABLE TT_A005 INTO WA_A005 WITH KEY MATNR = WA_FINAL-MATNR.
READ TABLE TT_KONP INTO WA_KONP WITH KEY KNUMH = WA_FINAL-KNUMH.
*** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
** LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
** CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'GRUN' name = LV_NAME1 object = 'MATERIAL' IMPORTING lv_lines = DATA(lv_lines1) ).
READ TABLE GT_ITEM INTO LS_ITEM INDEX 1.
READ TABLE IT_MSEG INTO WA_MSEG WITH KEY MBLNR = GS_ITEM-VGBEL XAUTO ='X' .
SELECT SINGLE * FROM KNA1 INTO WA_KNA1
SELECT SINGLE * FROM LFM1 INTO WA_LFM1
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE IT_ZEWAY_BILL
READ TABLE IT_MSEG_1 INTO WA_MSEG_1 WITH KEY MBLNR = GS_ITEM-VGBEL XAUTO = ''..
READ TABLE IT_ZEWAY INTO WA_ZEWAY WITH KEY VBELN = GS_ITEM-VBELN.
READ TABLE IT_ZEWAY_BILL INTO WA_ZEWAY_BILL WITH KEY VBELN = GS_ITEM-VBELN.
IF GV_TO_LGORT EQ LV_1 OR GV_TO_LGORT EQ LV_2 OR
GV_TO_LGORT EQ LV_3 OR GV_TO_LGORT EQ LV_4 OR
GV_TO_LGORT EQ LV_5 OR GV_TO_LGORT EQ LV_6 OR
GV_TO_LGORT EQ LV_7 OR GV_TO_LGORT EQ LV_8 OR
GV_TO_LGORT EQ LV_9 OR GV_TO_LGORT EQ LV_10 OR
GV_TO_LGORT EQ LV_11 OR GV_TO_LGORT EQ LV_12 OR
GV_TO_LGORT EQ LV_13 OR GV_TO_LGORT EQ LV_14
SELECT SINGLE STREET CITY1 POST_CODE1 STR_SUPPL3 LOCATION
* ELSEIF GV_FROM_LGORT eq 'FG01' AND LV_TO_LGORT EQ 'PN01' .
ELSEIF GV_FROM_LGORT EQ LV_1 OR GV_FROM_LGORT EQ LV_2 OR
GV_FROM_LGORT EQ LV_3 OR GV_FROM_LGORT EQ LV_4 OR
GV_FROM_LGORT EQ LV_5 OR GV_FROM_LGORT EQ LV_6 OR
GV_FROM_LGORT EQ LV_7 OR GV_FROM_LGORT EQ LV_8 OR
GV_FROM_LGORT EQ LV_9 OR GV_FROM_LGORT EQ LV_10 OR
GV_FROM_LGORT EQ LV_11 OR GV_FROM_LGORT EQ LV_12 OR
GV_FROM_LGORT EQ LV_13 OR GV_FROM_LGORT EQ LV_14
SELECT SINGLE STREET CITY1 POST_CODE1 STR_SUPPL3 LOCATION
ELSEIF GV_FROM_LGORT EQ 'PN01' AND SL_TO+0(1) EQ 'K' .
SELECT SINGLE STREET CITY1 POST_CODE1 STR_SUPPL3 LOCATION
ELSEIF GV_FROM_LGORT EQ 'PN01' AND LV_TO_LGORT EQ 'SAN1' .
SELECT SINGLE STREET CITY1 POST_CODE1 STR_SUPPL3 LOCATION
ELSEIF GV_FROM_LGORT EQ 'SAN1' AND LV_TO_LGORT EQ 'PN01' .
SELECT SINGLE STREET CITY1 POST_CODE1 STR_SUPPL3 LOCATION
ELSEIF GV_FROM_LGORT+0(1) EQ 'K' AND LV_TO_LGORT EQ 'PN01' .
SELECT SINGLE STREET CITY1 POST_CODE1 STR_SUPPL3 LOCATION
READ TABLE IT_MSEG INTO WA_MSEG WITH KEY MBLNR = GS_ITEM-VGBEL XAUTO ='X' .
SELECT SINGLE BKTXT FROM MKPF INTO GV_BKTXT
CLEAR : LV_LINE, LV_LATRS, LV_SPACE, LV_SAFE_LEN, LV_LATRS1,LV_LENGTH.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
READ TABLE IT_LINES INTO WA_LINES INDEX 1.
LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
READ TABLE IT_LINES INTO WA_LINES INDEX 2.
LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
READ TABLE IT_LINES INTO WA_LINES INDEX 3.
LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
READ TABLE IT_LINES INTO WA_LINES INDEX 4.
LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
READ TABLE IT_LINES INTO WA_LINES INDEX 5.
LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
READ TABLE IT_LINES INTO WA_LINES INDEX 6.
LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
READ TABLE IT_LINES INTO WA_LINES INDEX 7.
LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
READ TABLE IT_LINES INTO WA_LINES INDEX 8.
LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM KNA1 INTO WA_KNA1
SELECT SINGLE * FROM LFM1 INTO WA_LFM1
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE IT_ZEWAY_BILL
READ TABLE IT_MSEG_1 INTO WA_MSEG_1 WITH KEY MBLNR = GS_ITEM-VGBEL XAUTO = ''..
READ TABLE IT_ZEWAY INTO WA_ZEWAY WITH KEY VBELN = GS_ITEM-VBELN.
READ TABLE IT_ZEWAY_BILL INTO WA_ZEWAY_BILL WITH KEY VBELN = GS_ITEM-VBELN.
DATA : IT_XKOMV TYPE KOMV OCCURS 0 WITH HEADER LINE.
READ TABLE GT_PURCHASING INTO GS_PURCHASING INDEX 1.
***READ TABLE it_xkomv WITH KEY kschl = 'JICR'. " AND
***READ TABLE it_xkomv WITH KEY kschl = 'ZCRN'. " AND
***READ TABLE it_xkomv WITH KEY kschl = 'JISR'. " AND
***READ TABLE it_xkomv WITH KEY kschl = 'ZSRN'. " AND
***READ TABLE it_xkomv WITH KEY kschl = 'ZIRN'. " AND
*IF SL_FROM eq 'PN01' AND GV_TO_LGORT EQ 'FG01' .""ADDED BY PRANIT
IF GV_TO_LGORT EQ LV_1 OR GV_TO_LGORT EQ LV_2 OR
GV_TO_LGORT EQ LV_3 OR GV_TO_LGORT EQ LV_4 OR
GV_TO_LGORT EQ LV_5 OR GV_TO_LGORT EQ LV_6 OR
GV_TO_LGORT EQ LV_7 OR GV_TO_LGORT EQ LV_8 OR
GV_TO_LGORT EQ LV_9 OR GV_TO_LGORT EQ LV_10 OR
GV_TO_LGORT EQ LV_11 OR GV_TO_LGORT EQ LV_12 OR
GV_TO_LGORT EQ LV_13 OR GV_TO_LGORT EQ LV_14
SELECT SINGLE STREET CITY1 POST_CODE1 STR_SUPPL3 LOCATION
SELECT SINGLE STREET CITY1 POST_CODE1 STR_SUPPL3 LOCATION
ELSEIF SL_FROM EQ LV_1 OR SL_FROM EQ LV_2 OR
SL_FROM EQ LV_3 OR SL_FROM EQ LV_4 OR
SL_FROM EQ LV_5 OR SL_FROM EQ LV_6 OR
SL_FROM EQ LV_7 OR SL_FROM EQ LV_8 OR
SL_FROM EQ LV_9 OR SL_FROM EQ LV_10 OR
SL_FROM EQ LV_11 OR SL_FROM EQ LV_12 OR
SL_FROM EQ LV_13 OR SL_FROM EQ LV_14
SELECT SINGLE STREET CITY1 POST_CODE1 STR_SUPPL3 LOCATION
SELECT SINGLE STREET CITY1 POST_CODE1 STR_SUPPL3 LOCATION
ELSEIF SL_FROM EQ 'PN01' AND SL_TO+0(1) EQ 'K' .""ADDED BY PRANIT
SELECT SINGLE STREET CITY1 POST_CODE1 STR_SUPPL3 LOCATION
SELECT SINGLE STREET CITY1 POST_CODE1 STR_SUPPL3 LOCATION
ELSEIF SL_FROM EQ 'PN01' AND LV_TO_LGORT EQ 'SAN1' .""ADDED BY PRANIT
SELECT SINGLE STREET CITY1 POST_CODE1 STR_SUPPL3 LOCATION
SELECT SINGLE STREET CITY1 POST_CODE1 STR_SUPPL3 LOCATION
ELSEIF SL_FROM EQ 'K' AND LV_TO_LGORT EQ 'PN01' .
SELECT SINGLE STREET CITY1 POST_CODE1 STR_SUPPL3 LOCATION
SELECT SINGLE STREET CITY1 POST_CODE1 STR_SUPPL3 LOCATION
ELSEIF SL_FROM EQ 'SAN1' AND LV_TO_LGORT EQ 'PN01' .
SELECT SINGLE STREET CITY1 POST_CODE1 STR_SUPPL3 LOCATION
SELECT SINGLE STREET CITY1 POST_CODE1 STR_SUPPL3 LOCATION
READ TABLE IT_FINAL INTO WA_FINAL INDEX 1.
SELECT SINGLE VKBUR FROM VBAK INTO @DATA(LV_VKBUR)
SELECT SINGLE BEZEI FROM TVKBT INTO LV_BRANCH
PERFORM GET_TEXT USING OBJNAME 'VBBK' 'Z038' 'E' CHANGING GV_TEXT_LD.
PERFORM GET_TEXT USING OBJNAME 'VBBK' 'Z039' 'E' CHANGING GV_TEXT_TAG.
PERFORM GET_TEXT USING OBJNAME 'VBBK' 'Z999' 'E' CHANGING GV_TEXT_TPI.
PERFORM GET_TEXT USING OBJNAME 'MATERIAL' 'GRUN' 'S' CHANGING GV_TEXT_NOTE.
DATA: LT_LINES TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF TLINE,
SELECT SINGLE STEUC INTO GV_STEUC FROM MARC
CLEAR : LT_LINES , LV_LINE, LV_LATRS, LV_SPACE, LV_SAFE_LEN, LV_LATRS1,LV_LENGTH.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'Z888' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBP' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
CLEAR : LV_LINE, LV_LATRS, LV_SPACE, LV_SAFE_LEN, LV_LATRS1,LV_LENGTH.
*** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
** LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
** CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
** CONCATENATE GV_COMM WA_LINES-TDLINE INTO GV_COMM SEPARATED BY SPACE.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'Z041' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).

FORMS.FPCLINE: FORM get_text USING objname TYPE tdobname
DATA : text_lines TYPE TABLE OF tline,
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = txt_id name = objname object = obj_typ IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
*** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
